requirement_topic.en: SSEC Grid or Mini-Grid Connection — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 50 Hz / 230/400 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: SSEC电网或微电网接入——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 230/400 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: SSEC電網或微電網接入——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 230/400 V參數

summary.en: South Sudan's PV-inverter market is still nascent and project-specific. Grid-connected or mini-grid projects should expect SSEC, the project engineer, donor lender, or EPC specification to request IEC grid-interface evidence, especially IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface performance. South Sudan uses a 50 Hz supply with nominal 230/400 V low-voltage service. This is the same frequency as China but the voltage differs from China's 220/380 V nominal baseline, so inverter firmware, over/under-voltage thresholds, reconnection timing, and protection relay settings should be validated for 230/400 V operation. Extreme ambient heat and diesel-hybrid operation should also be considered in derating and commissioning tests.
summary.zh: 南苏丹光伏逆变器市场仍处于起步阶段，要求通常按项目确定。并网或微电网项目应预计SSEC、项目工程师、捐助方贷款人或EPC规格会要求IEC并网接口证据，尤其是IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口性能。南苏丹采用50 Hz供电，低压标称为230/400 V。其频率与中国相同，但电压不同于中国220/380 V标称基准，因此逆变器固件、过/欠压阈值、重连时间和保护继电器整定应针对230/400 V运行验证。极端环境高温和柴油混合运行也应纳入降额和调试测试考虑。
summary.zht: 南蘇丹光伏逆變器市場仍處於起步階段，要求通常按項目確定。併網或微電網項目應預計SSEC、項目工程師、捐助方貸款人或EPC規格會要求IEC併網介面證據，尤其是IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面性能。南蘇丹採用50 Hz供電，低壓標稱為230/400 V。其頻率與中國相同，但電壓不同於中國220/380 V標稱基準，因此逆變器韌體、過/欠壓閾值、重連時間和保護繼電器整定應針對230/400 V運行驗證。極端環境高溫和柴油混合運行也應納入降額和調試測試考慮。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
SSEC / project-specific grid-connection conditions for South Sudan public-grid, mini-grid, diesel-hybrid, or donor-funded PV projects
South Sudan low-voltage supply practice — 50 Hz, nominal 230/400 V

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, and GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter requirements. These documents are built around Chinese grid practice and factory settings, including 50 Hz 220/380 V nominal low-voltage assumptions. They are useful technical inputs but should not be presented as automatic substitutes for IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence or South Sudan project acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范，以及GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求。这些文件基于中国电网实践和出厂设置，包括50 Hz 220/380 V标称低压假设。它们可作为技术输入，但不应被作为IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据或南苏丹项目验收的自动替代。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範，以及GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求。這些文件基於中國電網實踐和出廠設定，包括50 Hz 220/380 V標稱低壓假設。它們可作為技術輸入，但不應被作為IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據或南蘇丹項目驗收的自動替代。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求

gap.en: Gap: South Sudan should be treated as a project-specific IEC market, not as a jurisdiction where China grid approvals transfer automatically. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, firmware setting sheets for 230/400 V at 50 Hz, and commissioning records for diesel-hybrid or weak-grid operation. Do not state that South Sudan voltage matches China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches; the nominal voltage differs.
gap.zh: 差距：南苏丹应被视为按项目采用IEC证据的市场，而不是中国并网批准可自动转移的司法辖区。出口商应准备IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、230/400 V 50 Hz固件设置表，以及柴油混合或弱电网运行调试记录。不得声称南苏丹电压与中国相同：只有50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同。
gap.zht: 差距：南蘇丹應被視為按項目採用IEC證據的市場，而不是中國併網批准可自動轉移的司法轄區。出口商應準備IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、230/400 V 50 Hz韌體設定表，以及柴油混合或弱電網運行調試記錄。不得聲稱南蘇丹電壓與中國相同：只有50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific and typically mandatory in practice where SSEC, a mini-grid operator, donor lender, EPC, or project owner requires grid-interface evidence; national product-specific enforcement is still developing
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China-side grid operator or voluntary certification expectations but does not automatically transfer to South Sudan project acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat South Sudan grid-connected PV inverter supply as project-specific IEC due diligence. Validate IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence, firmware settings for 230/400 V at 50 Hz, and heat / weak-grid derating before shipment. China GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 37408 evidence is not automatically accepted.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 将南苏丹并网光伏逆变器供货视为按项目开展IEC尽调。出货前核验IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据、230/400 V 50 Hz固件设置，以及高温/弱电网降额。中国GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408证据不会被自动接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 將南蘇丹併網光伏逆變器供貨視為按項目開展IEC盡調。出貨前核驗IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據、230/400 V 50 Hz韌體設定，以及高溫/弱電網降額。中國GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408證據不會被自動接受。
